diagrams.title: Cost-Benefit Analysis Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential steps in performing CBA for software projects
diagrams.purpose: Understand the systematic approach to CBA

diagrams.title: NPV Calculation Visualization
diagrams.description: Illustrates how future cash flows are discounted to present value and compared against initial investment

diagrams.title: Break-even Analysis Graph
diagrams.description: Graphical representation showing break-even point where total costs equal total benefits
elements: Total Cost Line (starts at initial investment, increases slowly)
Total Benefit Line (starts at zero, increases over time)

diagrams.title: Discount Rate Impact on Present Value
diagrams.description: Shows how increasing discount rates progressively reduce the present value of future cash flows
diagrams.purpose: Comprehend time value of money concept

visuals.title: Cost Benefit Evaluation Techniques
visuals.description: Visual diagram for cost benefit evaluation techniques
